sentences.sentence: Lockers are located by the entrance.
sentences.phonetic_focus: clear word-final consonants (lockers, located)

sentences.sentence: Free weights are stored along the back wall.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (-ts, str-) and linking (stored_along)

sentences.sentence: A clean towel is included with your daily pass.
sentences.phonetic_focus: linking between words (is_included) and reduced function words

sentences.sentence: The cardio machines can be accessed during all open hours.
sentences.phonetic_focus: linking (can_be_accessed) and stress in compound noun (cardio machines)

sentences.sentence: You will find a water fountain near the study room.
sentences.structure: declarative with direct address and prepositional phrase
sentences.phonetic_focus: stress placement in compound noun (study room); direct address

sentences.sentence: If you need a spotter, simply ask any coordinator on the floor.
sentences.phonetic_focus: conditional intonation (rising if-clause, falling main clause)

sentences.sentence: To plan your routine for our group classes, check the weekly schedule posted by the front counter.
sentences.structure: fronted infinitive clause + comma-split wayfinding pointer
sentences.phonetic_focus: reduced function words in rapid sequence (for our, to your); stress in compound noun (front counter)

sentences.sentence: Safety goggles are stored near the sink.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant cluster (-ggles) and word-final consonants (sink)

sentences.sentence: Lab coats are required for all bench experiments.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (-ts, -nts) in required and experiments

sentences.sentence: The fire blanket hangs on the wall behind you.
sentences.structure: declarative with prepositional phrase and direct address
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (-nk-, -ll) and linking (hangs_on)

sentences.sentence: Chemical spills must be reported to the officer immediately.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (-lls, -cts) and reduced syllables (immediately)

sentences.sentence: The eyewash station is tested automatically every Wednesday morning.
sentences.phonetic_focus: reduced syllables in multi-syllable words (automatically, Wednesday)

sentences.sentence: You should wash your hands before leaving the room.
sentences.structure: declarative with direct address and participial extension
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (-nds) and linking (before_leaving)

sentences.sentence: If you cannot locate the emergency shower, check the floor plan posted beside the main exit door.
sentences.structure: fronted conditional clause + comma-split wayfinding pointer
sentences.phonetic_focus: linked speech across clause boundaries (if you_experience); final consonant clusters at phrase boundaries (-ges to, exit door)

sentences.sentence: First, rinse the fresh lettuce.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant cluster (fr-) and word-final consonants (rinse, fresh)

sentences.sentence: Next, tear the leaves into small even pieces.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (-ves, -ces) and linking (into_small)

sentences.sentence: Then slice the cucumber and the ripe tomatoes.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant cluster (sl-) and linking (and_the)

sentences.sentence: Add the chopped vegetables to a large mixing bowl.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (-pped, -bles) and stress in compound noun (mixing bowl)

sentences.sentence: Pour a little olive oil over the fresh greens.
sentences.phonetic_focus: linking (a_little, oil_over) and consonant cluster (gr-)

sentences.sentence: Sprinkle a pinch of salt across the whole bowl.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (spr-, -lt) and linking (pinch_of)

sentences.sentence: Lastly, toss everything together gently and serve the salad onto your chilled plates.
sentences.phonetic_focus: linked speech across clause boundaries (toss_everything); stress-timing across the long step; reduced function words (onto your)
